name: Unicon Optical Co., Ltd.
summary: Unicon Optical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells contact lenses primarily for ODM/OEM market in Taiwan. The company offers disposable contact, coating design color, aspheric, and silicone lenses. It also exports its products to Japan, China, Germany, the Netherlands, Italy, Poland, Russia, Canada, India, South Africa, and Singapore. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.
